hero_subtitle: Hello, dear brother. I am Dr. Sarah Johnson. I worked for 15 years in the men's health department at Johns Hopkins, and I designed a 100% natural program prepared specifically for your condition after a confidential Messenger consultation — to restore your confidence and manhood, God willing, with zero side effects.
pain_tag: Are you suffering from any of these issues?
pain_title: You are not alone, brother — more than 40% of men in the Arab world suffer in silence
pain_subtitle: Many feel ashamed to ask or try remedies that don't treat the real cause. Dr. Sarah knows the difference.
pain_card1_text: The relationship ends before it begins, and you feel embarrassed in front of your wife. You've tried many ways to delay it but without lasting results.
pain_card2_text: The erection doesn't complete or doesn't last, and you lose confidence in every encounter. Chemical pills exhaust you without solving the real cause.
pain_card3_text: You feel your size doesn't satisfy your wife or yourself. The false ads on the internet made you cautious — and you are right.
pain_quote: "If you solve this problem from its root, your confidence and manhood will return in front of your wife — and most importantly: your inner peace."
solution_title: Dr. Sarah's Custom Program — Not a Ready-Made "Magic Pill"
solution_subtitle: In 15 years of working in the men's health department at Johns Hopkins, I learned that every man's body is different, which is why I designed a program tailored to your condition.
solution_pillar1_text: Talk to me directly via Messenger. We discuss your condition, its duration, and your lifestyle. No need for a clinic visit, no paperwork, no embarrassing diagnosis.
solution_pillar2_text: I prepare a 100% natural blend (rare herbs + pure minerals) certified by FDA and SGS, tailored to your real cause.
solution_pillar3_text: For 30 days, you follow up with me personally via Messenger. We adjust the dosage, monitor progress, and fix anything — as if you are with your personal doctor.
solution_pillar4_text: The key difference: we treat the cause, not the symptom. That is why the result stays with you even after the program ends, God willing.
letter_tag: A Personal Letter from Dr. Sarah
letter_title: "I Know How You Feel — That's Why I Designed This Program"
letter_p2: During 15 years in my clinic, I listened to thousands of men carrying the same burden: "I know something is not right, but I am too ashamed to speak."
letter_p3: Many of them tried the blue pills and ended up worse than they started — headaches, heart palpitations, and a temporary effect that fades within hours.
letter_p4: I noticed that the Arab world needs a different solution: natural, safe, respecting privacy, and treating the cause not the symptom. So I spent 4 years developing a program that combines traditional Arabic herbal science with modern Johns Hopkins research.
letter_p5: Every formula I prepare is after consulting YOU — because your body is not like anyone else's. This is not a generic product you buy off a pharmacy shelf, but a program customized for you alone.
letter_p6: And I promise you one thing: If you don't feel a real difference within 30 days, I will refund your money in full with no questions asked.

faq_title: Answers to What's on Your Mind
faq_a1: Yes. The formulas are composed of rare herbs (such as Korean Red Ginseng, Tongkat Ali, premium Saffron) and pure minerals (Zinc, Magnesium, Selenium) — zero chemicals, zero synthetic hormones. Every ingredient is listed in the leaflet and documented with FDA and SGS certificates.
faq_q2: Are the products Halal and Sharia compliant?
faq_a2: Yes, God willing. They contain no alcohol and no derivatives from forbidden sources. 100% vegetarian capsules (no bovine gelatin). Halal certificate available upon request.
faq_q3: How long does it take to see results?
faq_a3: Most brothers notice a difference in energy and morning erections within 7-10 days. Clear improvement in premature ejaculation and erection comes between 15-30 days. The full and stable result is completed within 30 days. Every body has its own pace, which is why weekly follow-up with me is important.
faq_a4: Dr. Sarah's program is completely natural, and we have not recorded any serious side effects in +12,000 cases. Some brothers notice an energy increase that may make sleeping difficult in the first few days — simply take the last dose earlier. If you take blood pressure or diabetes medication, let me know in the consultation so we can adjust the plan.
faq_q5: How does cash on delivery work?
faq_a5: You order the program, we ship it to you with total confidentiality (neutral packaging that does not reveal the contents). When the courier arrives, you inspect the order in front of him and pay cash — there are no upfront fees. Available in all Gulf countries, Egypt, Jordan, Lebanon, Morocco, Tunisia, Algeria, and Iraq.
faq_q6: Is the result permanent or will I need to renew?
faq_a6: This is the most important question. The key difference in Dr. Sarah's program is that it treats the cause (blood flow, hormonal balance, nerve health) not the symptom. That is why after completing 30 days, brothers tell me the result lasted with them for months and more, without needing to take anything daily.
faq_q7: Will Dr. Sarah really follow up with me personally?
faq_a7: Yes. Everyone who starts the program gets my number on Messenger directly, and I am the one who responds (or my direct medical team). We follow your progress weekly and adjust the dosage when needed. This is not selling a product, but complete treatment.
faq_a8: Absolute confidentiality is a fundamental condition. All conversations and photos are encrypted, invoices are under a general trade name, packaging is neutral, and the courier doesn't know what's inside. We never share your information with any third party — ever.
faq_a9: Simple: If you complete 30 days according to the instructions and don't feel a real difference, send me a message on Messenger and we will refund you the full amount within 7 business days — no questions, no paperwork, no arguments. This is my confidence in my program.

cert_fda_sgs_desc: The US Food and Drug Administration monitors the safety of every ingredient before and after production. Swiss SGS conducts 46 independent laboratory tests on each batch to ensure it is free of prohibited substances.
cert_gmp_desc: Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) ensures that every stage — from receiving raw materials to final product packaging — is carried out under strict supervision at a Johns Hopkins-approved facility.
cert_halal_desc: Internationally certified Halal certificate from the British Halal Registrar — Sharia inspectors visited the factory personally and verified every ingredient to ensure it is free of alcohol and prohibited animal substances.
cert_fs1_desc: US food safety certificate confirming the product is free of harmful chemicals and prohibited ingredients. Certified by the International Food Safety Authority.
cert_fs2_desc: A second certificate proving the quality and purity of all plant-based ingredients used in the custom formula. Certified by independent SGS laboratories.
cert_summary: Every formula is produced in a GMP-certified US facility, undergoes 46 independent laboratory tests by SGS — FDA registered and internationally Halal certified.
